title: Git Branch Strategy: Best Practices for Teams
problem_description: Choosing the right Git branch strategy is crucial for team collaboration, but many teams struggle with maintaining a clean and efficient workflow.
how_to_solve: Our tool helps you implement and enforce a consistent Git branch strategy, including feature branches, release branches, and hotfixes. It provides clear guidelines and automation tools to keep your repository organized.
code_example:
# Example Git workflow

# Create a feature branch
git checkout -b feature/new-feature

# Make changes and commit
git add .
git commit -m "Implement new feature"

# Push to remote
git push origin feature/new-feature

# Create a pull request
# After review, merge to main
git checkout main
git pull origin main
git merge feature/new-feature
git push origin main

# Delete the feature branch
git branch -d feature/new-feature
git push origin --delete feature/new-feature
